text.div:
Generated Narrative: CodeSystem ACCESSUnalignmentReasonCS

This case-sensitive code system https://dsacms.github.io/cmmi-access-model/CodeSystem/ACCESSUnalignmentReasonCS defines the following codes:

CodeDisplayDefinition
geographic-relocated Geographic relocatedPatient has relocated outside of the geographic area in which the aligned participant is licensed to provide services.
loss-of-contact Loss of contactDespite good faith efforts, defined as making three or more outreach attempts over 30 or more days, contact with the patient has been lost and therefore no longer able to engage with them.
no-longer-clinically-eligible No longer clinically eligiblePatient's conditions have changed such that they are no longer eligible for the ACCESS Model.
patient-initiated Patient initiatedPatient no longer wants to participate in the ACCESS Model after the initial 90-day lock-in period.

name: ACCESSUnalignmentReasonCS
title: ACCESS Unalignment Reason Codes
description: This codesystem defines the codes indicating the reason for the requested unalignment.
copyright: Copyright (c) 2026 Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS).

concept.definition: Patient has relocated outside of the geographic area in which the aligned participant is licensed to provide services.
Despite good faith efforts, defined as making three or more outreach attempts over 30 or more days, contact with the patient has been lost and therefore no longer able to engage with them.
Patient's conditions have changed such that they are no longer eligible for the ACCESS Model.
Patient no longer wants to participate in the ACCESS Model after the initial 90-day lock-in period.
